lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. Mechanical systems are unreliable and require repair.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily damaged with torn upholstery and missing components. Mechanically, the engine requires major repairs and the transmission is not functioning correctly.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age. The exterior has some visible paint fading on the roof and hood, along with a few minor door dings and scratches. Inside, the cabin is well-kept, though the driver's seat shows some moderate bolster wear. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, but it will likely need new brakes and a standard tune-up in the near future. It’s a solid option for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind a bit of cosmetic character.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle is in poor condition and needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, but it offers a fantastic opportunity to build something great from the ground up. It’s an honest fixer-upper priced to reflect its current state, ready for someone with the skills to bring it back to life!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior paint has several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and some fading on the roof and hood. Inside, the seats show visible wear and there are a few minor stains on the carpet. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, though a buyer should expect the typical maintenance needs associated with a car of this age. It is a reliable, honest vehicle that would serve well as a daily driver for someone prioritizing utility over cosmetic perfection.

We are pleased to present this immaculate vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m so excited for whoever gets to drive this beauty home. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in such incredible shape that it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! You won’t find a single scratch on it—it’s been pampered since day one. If you’re looking for a ride that’s truly like-new and ready for a new adventure, this is the one. Come see it for yourself!
This E36 M3 represents a superlative example of the S52-powered legend. The 3.2-liter naturally aspirated inline-six
2021 Model X. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

Presenting an immaculate, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning enthusiast. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior free of any imperfections, swirls, or road rash. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, gleaming under a professional ceramic sealant. Step inside to find an interior that appears untouched; the upholstery is supple with no signs of wear, the carpets are pristine, and the original factory scent remains.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber, this vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously curated and preserved to the highest standards, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence. Every detail reflects a standard of maintenance that transcends the typical market offering, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, having been curated with the utmost attention to detail and professional care. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of excellence typically reserved for private collections. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade specimen, which stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and superior engineering.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely stunning condition—it’s been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You’ve gotta see it to believe how pristine it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This collector-grade specimen features a naturally aspirated 4.0L flat-six engine, boasting a 9,000 RPM red
Mint condition car. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service history included. Runs perfectly.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with zero imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and ceramic coated to protect the factory paint. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows absolutely no signs of wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, document-backed service history and a powertrain that delivers a smooth, powerful, and whisper-quiet driving experience. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a flawlessly maintained example that looks, feels, and drives like new.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to maintenance, from its flawless exterior finish to the meticulously detailed interior. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity and mechanical excellence. We invite rigorous inspection to confirm its peerless state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute refinement, this automobile represents a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of unrivaled caliber.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m honestly a little sad to see this one go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels brand new! It’s been babied since day one, kept in a garage, and runs perfectly. If you’re looking for something that’s basically flawless and ready for an adventure, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Presenting an impeccable 2004 BMW M3 (E46) finished in Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system to deliver linear power to a precise 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis integrity is paramount; the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the suspension geometry remains true to factory specifications. This vehicle includes a torque-sensing limited-slip differential and retains its original VIN-stamped body panels with flawless paint depth. Mechanically robust with documented rod bearing replacement and a recent valve adjustment, this M3 offers a pure, analog driving experience in a condition rarely preserved. A turn-key investment for the serious collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that defies its age and stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car has been preserved in a climate-controlled environment and presents in breathtaking showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-original luster, protected by a professional ceramic coating; you will find no swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections here. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule. The premium leather upholstery remains supple with absolutely no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized centers with a comprehensive paper trail documenting its perfect health. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the drive is tight, silent, and powerful, mirroring its original delivery-day performance. This is an investment-grade example for the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to ensure an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising caliber.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic profile and a pristine, meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak operational performance, offering the discerning driver an unparalleled experience of luxury and reliability. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hi everyone! I’m listing my absolute pride and joy today. This car is in truly flawless condition—it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve been super meticulous with its care, so it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. I’m really sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Offering a museum-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD, maintained to the highest mechanical standards. The 13B-REW power plant retains its factory sequential twin-turbocharger configuration, delivering a linear power band with zero boost leaks. Chassis rigidity is exceptional, featuring a perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution and original double-wishbone suspension components. Recent compression tests show optimal, uniform results across all rotor faces, ensuring the integrity of the apex seals. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 5-speed manual and a factory Torsen limited-slip differential. Every vacuum line and cooling passage has been vetted for peak thermal efficiency. This is a true turnkey example for the discerning collector.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since new. The exterior paint boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirl marks, complemented by wheels that are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh scent and shows no signs of wear, creasing, or fading. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with every scheduled maintenance performed exclusively by certified master technicians. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting the low mileage and careful ownership. This is a collector-grade specimen that drives with the same precision and smoothness as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Included with the sale are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a complete folder of service records. For the discerning buyer seeking a flawless driving experience, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic profile and an impeccable service history. Discerning collectors will appreciate the preservation of its original luster and the uncompromising precision of its mechanical performance. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and prestige.
